  About Me
  Hi! I'm Shivang — a Business Analytics graduate student at UC San Diego's Rady School of Management. I specialize in business intelligence, revenue analytics, and building data-driven solutions for enterprise clients.
  When I'm not crunching numbers, you'll find me watching soccer, chasing sunsets, or debating who's winning the next World Cup.

title: Resume
text:
Experience

Senior Business Intelligence Analyst — NuSummit Technologies
Apr 2023 – Apr 2025 · Remote
Designed and automated GTM & revenue dashboards for enterprise clients in financial services and insurance. Built forecasting and pipeline models in SQL/Snowflake using Salesforce data, improving quarterly revenue predictability. Partnered cross-functionally to define GTM KPIs, boosting campaign ROI by 20% and conversion rates by 12%. Developed ETL pipelines and Python validation scripts in AWS for near real-time executive dashboards. Created predictive models for customer segmentation achieving 94% accuracy across 5,000+ reviews.


Business Intelligence Analyst — Boston Institute of Analytics
Jun 2021 – Jan 2023 · Remote
Built cross-functional dashboards tracking pipeline health, marketing impact, and customer success. Optimized SQL queries in Snowflake to automate reporting, reducing dashboard latency by 70%. Developed a Multi-Touch Attribution framework to determine ROAS and guide spend decisions. Conducted funnel and A/B testing in HubSpot and Salesforce. Supported migration from Qlik to Tableau through standardized metrics and self-serve analytics.


Data Strategy Intern — Kustard.ai
Apr – Jul 2019 · Remote
Designed data models and dashboards analyzing pipeline and lead efficiency. Built predictive engagement models improving targeting accuracy to 94%. Automated sales reporting cutting turnaround time by 30%, boosting engagement by 7%.
